rules: Title Case always; no terminal punctuation except comedic ellipsis
no listicle numbers; superlatives carry the count
human verbs and human subjects over academic phrasing
specific names only in pipe subtitles or Your-Life-as
our twist: superlative-category + concrete paradox to open a curiosity gap
use the 'in History' suffix at most every other video; adjacent, not cloned
examples_theirs: When Nice People Snapped in History
examples_ours: The Nicest Man in History Was a One-Man Army
The Beggar Who Out-Bluffed an Empire
